compounds.frequency: twice a day, 5 days on 2 days off
twice a day, 5 days on 2 days off

benefits.description: Local injection near injury site eliminates pain within 30 minutes; subq abdomen and oral provided no benefit for injuries

protocol_notes: Has tried oral, subq abdomen, and local injection routes. Local injection near injury is sole winner for musculoskeletal issues. Runs BPC and TB500 for ~12 weeks twice daily 5 on/2 off, then 2-4 weeks off, then another 12 weeks. Also takes additional peptides on top of this stack.
